title: rhus aromatica var. aromatica
intro: Rhus aromatica var. aromatica, also known as Fragrant Sumac, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family, native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rhus aromatica var. aromatica are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Rhus aromatica var. aromatica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be cautioned due to potential skin irritation and allergic reactions.
